steps.t: The food-cart is near the kitchen of Snowbourn. As food is scarce, Fastred wants you to make sure that people wait and do not swarm the food-stores. P…
Prepared rations can be found inside the kitchen of Snowbourn. You should collect rations for the people of Snowbourn.
Dudweld, Ganburh, and Elfswith can be found throughout Snowbourn. You should distribute the food to Dudweld, Ganburh, and Elfswith.
Gísling can be found in central Snowbourn. You should speak with Gísling and let him know you distributed the food as Fastred ordered.
